entry_exit.entry: If 2 out of 3 signals are triggered, enter long positions in major pet food manufacturers
entry_exit.exit: If all 3 signals return to normal levels, exit long positions

trigger.pet_food_production_decline: If USDA monthly pet food production index drops by more than 5% year-over-year
trigger.freight_transportation_index_drop: If Freight Transportation Services Index falls by more than 3% month-over-month
trigger.pet_food_search_spike: If Google Trends index for pet food-related searches increases by more than 20% month-over-month

position_sizing.notes: Sizing based on overall portfolio risk tolerance
